testcase.name: [CapstoneProject1-ParkingCalculator] Parking Cost Calculator Test Suite › Scenario 1: Valet Parking (less than 5 hours)
testcase.system-out:
================================================ Parking Cost Calculator Test Suite ================================================
Parking Cost Calculator page is loaded
Scenario 1: Valet Parking (less than 5 hours) | Entry Time: 09:00 AM | Exit Time: 12:00 PM | Expected Cost: $12.00
Parking Cost Calculator page is reloaded for the next test

testcase.name: [CapstoneProject1-ParkingCalculator] Parking Cost Calculator Test Suite › Scenario 2: Valet Parking (more than 5 hours)
testcase.system-out:
Parking Cost Calculator page is loaded
Scenario 2: Valet Parking (more than 5 hours) | Entry Time: 09:00 AM | Exit Time: 03:00 PM | Expected Cost: $18.00
Parking Cost Calculator page is reloaded for the next test

testcase.name: [CapstoneProject1-ParkingCalculator] Parking Cost Calculator Test Suite › Scenario 3: Valet Parking (Overnight)
testcase.system-out:
Parking Cost Calculator page is loaded
Scenario 3: Valet Parking (Overnight) | Entry Time: 10:00 PM | Exit Time: 08:00 AM (next day) | Expected Cost: $18.00
Parking Cost Calculator page is reloaded for the next test

testcase.name: [CapstoneProject1-ParkingCalculator] Parking Cost Calculator Test Suite › Scenario 4: Valet Parking - Invalid Input (Exit Before Entry)
testcase.system-out:
Parking Cost Calculator page is loaded
Scenario 4: Valet Parking - Invalid Input (Exit Before Entry) | Entry Time: 05:00 PM | Exit Time: 02:00 PM | Expected Cost: $0.00
Parking Cost Calculator page is reloaded for the next test

testcase.name: [CapstoneProject1-ParkingCalculator] Parking Cost Calculator Test Suite › Scenario 5: Short-term Parking (1 hour)
testcase.system-out:
Parking Cost Calculator page is loaded
Scenario 5: Short-term Parking (1 hour) | Entry Time: 09:00 AM | Exit Time: 10:00 AM | Expected Cost: $2.00
Parking Cost Calculator page is reloaded for the next test

testcase.name: [CapstoneProject1-ParkingCalculator] Parking Cost Calculator Test Suite › Scenario 6: Short-term Parking (1.5 hours)
testcase.system-out:

Parking Cost Calculator page is reloaded for the next test

testcase.name: [CapstoneProject1-ParkingCalculator] Parking Cost Calculator Test Suite › Scenario 7: Short-term Parking (2 hours)
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: [CapstoneProject1-ParkingCalculator] Parking Cost Calculator Test Suite › Scenario 8: Short-term Parking (Overnight but < 24 hours)
testcase.system-out:
Parking Cost Calculator page is loaded
Scenario 8: Short-term Parking (Overnight but < 24 hours) | Entry Time: 10:00 PM | Exit Time: 08:00 AM | Expected Cost: $20.00
Parking Cost Calculator page is reloaded for the next test

testcase.name: [CapstoneProject1-ParkingCalculator] Parking Cost Calculator Test Suite › Scenario 9: Short-term Parking (Overnight but = 24 hours)
testcase.system-out:
Parking Cost Calculator page is loaded
Scenario 9: Short-term Parking (Overnight but = 24 hours) | Entry Time: 09:00 AM | Exit Time: 09:00 AM | Expected Cost: $24.00
Parking Cost Calculator page is reloaded for the next test

testcase.name: [CapstoneProject1-ParkingCalculator] Parking Cost Calculator Test Suite › Scenario 10: Short-term Parking (Overnight but > 24 hours ~ 25.5 hours)
testcase.system-out:
Parking Cost Calculator page is loaded

Parking Cost Calculator page is reloaded for the next test

testcase.name: [CapstoneProject1-ParkingCalculator] Parking Cost Calculator Test Suite › Scenario 11: Invalid Input (Exit Before Entry)
testcase.system-out:
